---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the Tuya BLE Mesh integration
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case
Explain why this feature would be useful.

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this working.

## Alternatives Considered
Other solutions or workarounds you've thought of.

## Device Support
Does this require support for a new device type?
- Device Model: (if applicable)
- Device Type: (light, sensor, switch, etc.)

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or examples.
